titleStmt.title: SII 35.53: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 53. (A.R. No. 78 of 1950-51.) MŪḌŪR, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the Rāmēśvara temple.

This inscription which refers itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva ruling from the capital Jayantipura is dated Bhūlōka-varsha 12, Piṁgaḷa, Phālguna ba. 10, Thursday corresponding to A.D. 1138, February 10.

It records a gift of land for the offerings etc., to the god Mallikārjuna by Sōvagāvuṇḍa of Mūḍeyūr, situated in Eḍevoḷal-70, when Vira-Kadamba Mallikārjuna, son of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Tailaha of the Kaḍaṁba family was governing Banvāse-12000 and Panuṁgal-500. The gift was entrusted to Boppejiya. Sēnabōva Paṇḍita who handed over a sthāna to his son (i.e., disciple) Mallikārjunajīya. Sēnabova Sarvadēvaṇṇa wrote the record and Māḷeya engraved it.
On the top of the figures.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ā cakravarti mallikārjunadē
variṁge suṁkadiya rpānanaṁdā
vaḷakaṁ koṭṭadu hattettina suṁka .

© namastuṁgasiracuṁbicaṁdracāmaratācāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūla
staṁbhāya saṁbhavē .
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrī pritivīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramē
svaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyabharaṇaṁ strīmatri
bhuvanamalladēva vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁ
drārkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi . svasti samadhigatapaṁca
mahāsabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara banavāsipurāvarādhīśvaraṁ jayantimadhukē
svaradēvalabdavaraprasāda mrigamadāmōdaṁ triyakṣakṣasaṁbhavaṁ caturāsi
ti nagarādiṣṭitaṁ lālaṭalōcanaṁ caturbhujaṁgaḷdi tāṣāḍasvamēdaṁdikṣā
dīkṣitaṁ himavadugiriṁdraruṁdrasikharisakisaṁstāpita sphaṭikasiḷāprabha khaḍga
madagaja mahāmahimābhirāma kādaṁbacakri mayūravarmma mahāmahipāḷa
kuḷabhūṣaṇa permmāḍi tūryyanirghōṣaṇaṁ sakācarēṁdra dvaja virājamā
namānōttuṁga sihvalāṁcanada tātvikācana samarajayakāraṇaṁ kadaṁ
barābharaṇaṁ mākkoḷvaragaṁḍa pratāpamārtaṁḍa maṁḍaḷikagaṁḍa bhaṁgegāṟanityakiḷanā
māvaḷi virājitamappa srīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ tailahadēvanakumāra srī vīra
gaḍaṁba mallikārjunadēva banavāsipannicāsiramumaṁ pānuṁgalayinūṟa
maṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyuttamire . svasti śrīmatucāḷu
kya bhūlōkavarṣada hanneraḍaneya piṁgaḷasaṁvatsarada pālguṇa bahuḷa
10 brihavāradaṁdu Eḍevoḷeleppattaṟa baḷiya bāḍaṁ śrīmallikārjuna dēvana
mūḍeyūra sōvagāvuṇḍanumirddu boppajīyapaṁṇḍitargge kālaṁ ka
cci kaidhāreyaṟedu dhārāpūrbbakaṁ māḍi koṭṭa dharmma dēvara muṁ
daṇa keṟeya keḷage gadde mattaleraḍu dēvara nivēdyakkaṁ tapōdhanara grā
sakkaṁ mattalondu dēvara māṭakūṭa kūṭakkaṁ mattalondu Antu ma
ttaleraḍu boppayajīyapaṇḍitaru tanna putra mallikārjuna
najīyargge sthānamaṁ koṭṭaru maṅgaḷa mahāsrī [.] I dharmmamaṁ prati
pāḷisidavaru vāraṇāsiyali gaṁgeya taḍiyalu sāsiraliṁga
pratiṣṭe māḍida phalamakku . I dharmmamanaḷidavaṁ sāsira brāhmaṇara sā
sira kavileyanaḷida mahāpātaka . boppeyajīyapaṁḍita Ekkōṭi
mahādēvara pādārādhaka . sāsanava bareda sēnabōva sarvvadēvaṇna
Akkarava hoyda rūvāri māḷeya . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vāyō harēti
vasuṁdharā śaṣṭirvarssasahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 35.53 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
